title: Tasks Get Request
description: Request parameters for retrieving a specific task by ID with optional conversation history across all AdCP domains

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to retrieve

include_history.description: Include full conversation history for this task (may increase response size)

include_result.description: Include the task's result payload when status is completed. Defaults to false for lightweight status-only polls. When true, sellers MUST include result on the response when status is completed.

examples.description: Get task with full conversation history
Poll for task completion including result payload
